access_token.description: Yotpo API access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

store_id.description: Yotpo store ID; substituted into every stream's store-scoped path.

base_url.description: Yotpo API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
